attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as 38 (adult) — the source note gives no age; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female — the source note gives no sex; subclinical Hashimoto's thyroiditis is strongly female-predominant, but this is an inference to confirm on review.
Geographic context not inferable from 'private residence' — omitted.
Provisional case_id SPEC-ENDO-03-00244 — SEQ is provisional (derived from source AMS-044); ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence within the SPEC-ENDO-03 bucket.
Specialty assigned ENDO (subclinical Hashimoto's is the underlying finding) with MH secondary (acute panic is the presenting problem) — reviewer may prefer MH as primary.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person urgent home visit. Clinician-measured vitals (BP 135/85, HR 102, RR 22, Temp 36.6, SpO2 100%), cardiac/respiratory auscultation, thyroid palpation and reflex examination were reprojected as sealed clinician findings in nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits; only patient-reportable data (self-reported weight, subjective fast breathing) placed in 01.objective_data_offered. Presentation layer de-anchored to the patient's pre-diagnosis fear.

Baseline tier set to T2 (prompt GP 24-48h + ECG), deliberately more conservative than the source's routine 'next week' plan because the AI Doctor cannot auscultate or obtain an ECG to exclude arrhythmia.

Candidate codes only (SNOMED/ICD-10-AM), unverified pending terminology receipt; myxoedema differential coded with the general Hypothyroidism SNOMED 40930008 as a best-effort candidate — confirm on review.

No dose recorded for any medication: all three medication entries are negative-necessity (not_indicated_here / should_NOT_recommend) encoding errors of commission, and the source note prescribed no acute drug.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
